Management of UI elements, utility functions, core dumps, event loops, fault handling, application state, kernel heap, logging, low power modes, memory layout, panic handling, memory allocation, task management, system messages, system versions, and task timers for Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[ui](ui/README.md)**: Management of modal windows, kernel UI graphics, content indicators, timeline actions, and system icons.
- **[util](util/README.md)**: Delay, factory reset, firmware reset, interval timer, memory segment, sleep, stack info, standby, stop, task initialization, task telemetry, and wait-for-interrupt functions and headers for Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[core_dump.c](core_dump.c.md)**: Core dump logic for writing to SPI flash under constraints, avoiding FreeRTOS functions and regular flash drivers.
- **[core_dump.h](core_dump.h.md)**: Functions for managing core dumps, including reset, size retrieval, and Bluetooth slot reservation.
- **[core_dump_private.h](core_dump_private.h.md)**: Defines structures and constants for managing core dump storage and retrieval in Pebble firmware.
- **[event_loop.c](event_loop.c.md)**: Implements the main event loop for handling system events and managing application processes in the Pebble firmware.
- **[event_loop.h](event_loop.h.md)**: Functions for managing event callbacks, blocking pop-ups, and controlling the main loop in the launcher.
- **[events.c](events.c.md)**: Manages event queues and related operations for the Pebble firmware kernel, including initialization, event posting, and cleanup.
- **[events.h](events.h.md)**: Defines event types and structures for the Pebble firmware, including functions for event management and processing.
- **[fault_handling.c](fault_handling.c.md)**: Handles fault detection and logging for memory, bus, and usage faults in the Pebble firmware.
- **[fault_handling.h](fault_handling.h.md)**: Functions for triggering and handling out-of-memory and general faults in the firmware.
- **[kernel_applib_state.c](kernel_applib_state.c.md)**: Manages application state and logging for Pebble firmware, including mutex handling and service states.
- **[kernel_applib_state.h](kernel_applib_state.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and accessing various application library states in the Pebble firmware.
- **[kernel_heap.c](kernel_heap.c.md)**: Manages kernel heap initialization, locking, and analytics in the Pebble firmware.
- **[kernel_heap.h](kernel_heap.h.md)**: Header file for initializing and accessing the kernel heap in the Pebble firmware.
- **[logging.c](logging.c.md)**: Implements logging functionality for the Pebble firmware, including serial and flash logging.
- **[logging_private.h](logging_private.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for logging messages, including serial and fault handler logging.
- **[low_power.c](low_power.c.md)**: Manages low power mode transitions and state for the Pebble firmware.
- **[low_power.h](low_power.h.md)**: Functions for managing low power states, including entering, exiting, and checking active status.
- **[memory_layout.c](memory_layout.c.md)**: Defines and manages memory protection unit (MPU) regions for the Pebble firmware, including setup and access functions.
- **[memory_layout.h](memory_layout.h.md)**: Defines memory region assignments and functions for managing MPU regions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[mpu_regions.template.h](mpu_regions.template.h.md)**: Defines template macros for MPU region base addresses, sizes, and disabled subregions.
- **[panic.c](panic.c.md)**: Handles system panic events by logging errors, managing modals, and triggering state machine panic.
- **[panic.h](panic.h.md)**: Declares functions for handling and retrieving panic error codes.
- **[pbl_malloc.c](pbl_malloc.c.md)**: Memory allocation functions for different heaps (task, app, kernel) with error handling and wrappers.
- **[pbl_malloc.h](pbl_malloc.h.md)**: Memory allocation functions for managing multiple heaps in firmware, including app and kernel heaps.
- **[pebble_tasks.c](pebble_tasks.c.md)**: Manages Pebble task creation, registration, suspension, and analytics in a FreeRTOS environment.
- **[pebble_tasks.h](pebble_tasks.h.md)**: Defines and manages tasks in the Pebble firmware, including task registration, suspension, and retrieval.
- **[pulse_logging.c](pulse_logging.c.md)**: Implements logging functionality for PULSEv2, including message serialization and ISR buffering.
- **[pulse_logging.h](pulse_logging.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and logging messages using PULSEv2, including synchronous and fault handler logging.
- **[reset.c](reset.c.md)**: Functions for preparing and executing system resets, including handling software failures.
- **[system_message.c](system_message.c.md)**: Handles system messages related to firmware updates, including sending, receiving, and processing update statuses.
- **[system_message.h](system_message.h.md)**: Defines system message types and functions for sending system messages related to firmware updates.
- **[system_versions.c](system_versions.c.md)**: Handles system version information and communication for firmware, including version requests and responses.
- **[task_timer.c](task_timer.c.md)**: Implements task timer management in a FreeRTOS environment, including creation, scheduling, and deletion.
- **[task_timer.h](task_timer.h.md)**: Implements task-specific timer management with creation, scheduling, stopping, and deletion functions.
- **[task_timer_manager.h](task_timer_manager.h.md)**: Manages task timers with initialization, execution, and debugging functions.
